reasoning: The chart fails to answer the specific question asked ('How much revenue... in years 2021-2024'). Instead of showing annual totals or a clear year-over-year comparison, it displays monthly data points for only two years (2021 and 2022) while completely omitting the data for 2023 and 2024 from the visual plot itself. Although annotations provide the total sums for all four years, these are placed as floating text labels without corresponding bars or axes markers, making them difficult to interpret visually. Furthermore, the x-axis limit is set to 23, cutting off any potential representation of later years even if they were included in the data array. A business user would find this confusing because the primary metric (annual revenue) is not directly visualized.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a bar chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the Y-axis shows the aggregated Total Revenue per year. This directly answers the question with a single glance.
